title: dianthus jaroslavii
intro: Dianthus jaroslavii, also known as the Chinese pink or fragrant pink, is a perennial plant species within the carnation family, valued for its vibrant pink flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dianthus jaroslavii include reducing fever, alleviating headaches and sore throats, and promoting digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
